jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Snapdeal
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
